headline: Will Church & Dwight (CHD) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on Church & Dwight Co, Raises Price Target to $86
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Church & Dwight Co (NYSE:CHD) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $79 to $86.
